name: @dotenvpp/wasm
description: WASM bindings for DotenvPP parsing, schema validation, and policy checks

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg && node scripts/fix-package-json.mjs pkg
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web && node scripts/fix-package-json.mjs pkg-web
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
